issue_title: Axis with skipped weekends doesn't have any ticks
issue_body_preview:
When updating teh examples to v14 as per https://github.com/d3fc/d3fc/issues/1109 - the following example shows a regression:

http://blockbuilder.org/ColinEberhardt/0a5cc7ca6c256dcd6ef1e2e7ffa468d4

When weekends are skipped, no tick marks are rendered
test_description_zh: 创建一个使用 d3fc 的坐标轴，配置为跳过周末（discontinuous scale with skip weekends），观察坐标轴上是否正确渲染了刻度线（tick marks）和刻度标签。
expected_result_zh: 即使配置了跳过周末的不连续时间刻度，坐标轴上仍应正常显示刻度线和刻度标签，不应出现刻度完全消失的情况。
